final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing photorealistic employee ID badge design for ByteDance (字节跳动), showing both front and back sides.

Style/medium: photorealistic product shot, physical ID card render
Composition: two cards side by side — left card showing front face, right card showing back face — on a neutral surface with soft shadow
Subject: ByteDance (字节跳动) employee ID badge, front side with company logo, employee photo placeholder, name field, job title field, employee number; back side with barcode or QR code, company address or policy text, magnetic stripe
Scene/backdrop: clean neutral light background, cards lying flat or slightly angled for depth
Lighting/mood: soft diffused light, subtle shadow beneath each card to convey physical material weight
Color palette: white card base with ByteDance brand colors (black and orange accents)
Materials/textures: glossy PVC card surface with slight specular highlight, printed ink texture, lanyard hole at top
Text (verbatim): 字节跳动
Constraints: both front and back must be fully visible and legible; card proportions must match standard CR80 ID card (85.6 × 54 mm)
Avoid: cartoon or flat illustration style, blurry text, missing either side of the card
